title: Fleet Air Arm Museum accounts
body: "The Fleet Air Arm Museum accounts were laid before Parliament in response to a legislative requirement or as a Return to an Address and were ordered to be printed by the House of Commons.  The National Museum of the Royal Navy group, created in 2012, consists of the company itself and the 4 Naval Service museums: National Museum of the Royal Navy, Royal Navy Submarine Museum, Royal Marines Museum and the Fleet Air Arm Museum. The group also operates HMS Victory as a visitor attraction.   From 2021 the Fleet Air Arm Museum accounts are published by the Charity Commission as part of the National Museum of the Royal Navy group accounts.  View the latest accounts and annual returns.  "
